core_mechanism: the replica method with Parisi replica-symmetry-breaking: obtaining a disorder-averaged free energy as the n->0 limit of n coupled copies of a randomly-disordered system, characterized by a hierarchical (ultrametric) overlap order-parameter matrix that encodes a rugged landscape of many nearly-degenerate metastable states
brief_reason: The abstract's central tools are the replica formalism, Parisi's solution of the Sherrington-Kirkpatrick model, and overlap order parameters, which together are exactly the replica/replica-symmetry-breaking machinery for averaging over quenched disorder and describing a hierarchy of metastable states.
